falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5,200 (a key resistance level) by 2.5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this level would indicate a strong bullish trend, contradicting the HOLD signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 65 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 65 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, invalidating the current HOLD by suggesting a imminent reversal rather than a bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces an unexpected 75-basis-point rate hike within 14 days, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to rise above 4.8%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a hawkish policy shift would create immediate market volatility and invalidate the HOLD by introducing a new dominant macro force conflicting with the bottom pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
